title: Table CRUD
description: Given a table, when I put/get/delete/upsert records, the table should maintain correct state. Supports scan, all, and bulk load operations. Also supports composite primary keys (partition + sort key): put/get/delete with composite PK, and two records with same partition but different sort keys coexist. Spec: features/core/table_crud.feature
